title: Iran’s leader was killed in February. The country will finally bury him.
summary_full: For the surviving Iranian regime, the funeral offers an opportunity to project power after withstanding months of war with Israel and the United States.
summary_public: For the surviving Iranian regime, the funeral offers an opportunity to project power after withstanding months of war with Israel and the United States.
